items.name: Brittany H.
items.text: I locked my keys in my car at the Turkey Creek shopping center on a Friday evening. Tristar Locksmith came out, got the door open, and the tech was incredibly friendly. Pricing was fair and exactly what they quoted on the phone. I can't recommend them enough.

items.name: Marcus T.
items.text: Called Tristar at 11 PM after realizing I'd left my house keys at work. The dispatcher was calm and helpful, and the locksmith came out and picked the deadbolt cleanly without any damage, even showed me how the lock mechanism worked while he was there. Outstanding service.

items.name: Donna P.
items.text: We just bought a home in Powell and wanted all the locks rekeyed before moving in. Tristar came out the same day I called, rekeyed four locks to a single key, and the whole job was done in one visit. Very professional and reasonably priced. Will use them again for sure.

items.name: Ray K.
items.text: My ignition cylinder seized up in a parking lot in Oak Ridge and I thought I was going to need a tow. Called Tristar and they sent someone who diagnosed the problem on the spot, extracted a small burr that had broken off inside the cylinder, and got me driving again. Saved me a lot of money and hassle.

items.name: Stephanie M.
items.text: I manage several rental properties in Maryville and Alcoa and Tristar Locksmith is my go-to for rekeying between tenants. They're reliable, always on time, and the master key setup they did for one of my properties has made my life so much easier. Highly recommend for property managers.

items.name: Bobby A.
items.text: Lost my car keys completely, no spare, no fob, nothing. Tristar came out to my home in Hardin Valley and made a brand new transponder key from scratch using my VIN. The job was done on-site and cost way less than the dealer quoted me. Absolutely will use again.

items.name: Cynthia L.
items.text: Had a break-in attempt at my condo in North Knoxville, the lock was damaged and the door frame was cracked. I called Tristar and they came the same evening, replaced the deadbolt, reinforced the strike plate, and made sure the door was secure before leaving. Very thorough and professional under stressful circumstances.

items.name: Kevin B.
items.text: Locked my keys in my truck at a gas station on the Parkway in Sevierville. Tristar sent someone out within the hour and got me back on the road fast. Very friendly technician, explained exactly what he was doing. Pricing was fair and exactly what they said on the phone.

items.name: Angela D.
items.text: Came home from work to find I'd left my house keys at the office. Called Tristar and they were at my door in Lenoir City in under an hour. The locksmith picked my deadbolt clean without any damage and had me inside in minutes. Great service, I'll call them every time.

items.name: Phil T.
items.text: Just moved into a new rental and wanted the locks changed before we unloaded the truck. Tristar came out same day and rekeyed all three locks to one key. Fast, professional, and reasonably priced. Exactly the kind of service you want when you're settling into a new place.

items.name: Sandra R.
items.text: Got to McGhee Tyson Airport and realized I'd locked my keys inside the car. Called Tristar from baggage claim. The technician arrived before my luggage even came around on the belt. Cannot believe how fast they responded. Worth every penny after a long travel day.

items.name: James W.
items.text: Forgot the combination to my gun safe and couldn't get it open. Tristar sent a technician who opened it without drilling, then helped me set a new combination and tested it several times before leaving. Very knowledgeable. I wouldn't have trusted anyone else with it.

items.name: Lisa N.
items.text: I own a small business in Karns and needed the master key system changed after a personnel situation. Tristar came out, assessed the locks, and had a new master key setup installed the same week. The technician clearly knew commercial hardware and the pricing was competitive.

items.name: Derek F.
items.text: Snapped my only car key off in the ignition in a parking lot in Oak Ridge. Tristar sent someone who extracted the broken piece, cut a new key, and programmed the transponder on site. I honestly thought I was facing a tow to the dealership. Saved me at least $300 and half a day of my life.

items.name: Patricia G.
items.text: My daughter locked us both out of the house on a cold January evening. Tristar came out to Seymour and had us inside within 45 minutes of the call. The technician was calm and professional and didn't make us feel embarrassed about the situation at all. Really appreciated the kindness.

items.name: Tony S.
items.text: Locked my keys in my truck out at Douglas Lake. Called Tristar and they came all the way out to Dandridge without hesitation. Handled it quickly and professionally. Good to know they cover this far out of Knoxville.

items.name: Michelle C.
items.text: Locked my keys in the rental car on vacation in Pigeon Forge. Completely panicked. Tristar had someone there in less than an hour, totally professional, and the price was more than fair. Saved our trip. Cannot thank them enough.
